title: DigCoolDown
body:
Dig Cooldown is a lightweight Forge mod that sets a minimum cooldown between consecutive block breaks by the player.
It helps prevent uncontrolled fast mining caused by modded tools (e.g. haste effect, high-efficiency picks).
Use the command /digcd set <tick> to change the cooldown value in-game (default is 5 ticks).
Actual behavior may slightly vary due to other enchantments or mod effects.
